items.raw_desc: Aljzat Solight Gumis aljzat, nedves és poros környezetbe, egyenes, IP65, fekete:The Solight socket is designed for use in harsh environments where there is a risk of increased humidity or dust. Thanks to the IP65 protection rating, it is suitable for use not only indoors, but also outdoors, in workshops, garages, warehouses or construction sites. It is designed for a maximum load of 3680 W, equivalent to 16 A at 230 V mains voltage. The socket has a bayonet thread that allows easy and safe connection to the Solight P78 plug.
